name: JellyShim
overview: Performance optimization plugin — smaller assets, compressed images, smarter caching.
description: JellyShim optimizes your Jellyfin web client: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native image resizing (AVIF/WebP/JPEG) with per-type settings, intelligent cache headers with ETag/304, HTML optimization (modulepreload, defer, preconnect), Link preload headers, CORS/CORP headers, and optional security headers. Zero external dependency — install, restart, done.

versions.changelog: Extensionless plugin endpoint optimization (e.g. /JellyfinEnhanced/script) via upstream Content-Type sniffing. Full i18n for config page with 12 languages (EN, FR, DE, ES, PT, IT, NL, RU, ZH, JA, KO, PL) — auto-detects Jellyfin locale with English fallback. Localization API at /JellyShim/Localization/{lang}. Removed dead code (AngleSharp, HtmlTransformer, FileTransformationBridge). Added 74 unit tests.

Fix: plugin asset corruption — strip Accept-Encoding before capturing upstream response so minification receives raw text instead of compressed binary. Adds Brotli/Gzip decompression fallback for edge cases. Fixes 'illegal character U+001B' errors on all third-party plugin scripts.

On-the-fly plugin asset optimization: third-party plugin JS/CSS (MediaBarEnhanced, JellyfinEnhanced, etc.) are now captured, minified, compressed (Brotli/Gzip), and cached on disk. New Clear Cache button in config page and scheduled task. ETag/304 support for cached plugin assets.

AVIF encoding via ffmpeg (zero install — uses Jellyfin's bundled libaom-av1), auto format negotiation AVIF > WebP > JPEG based on browser support, image optimization now covers ALL Jellyfin image endpoints including /emby/ and /mediabrowser/ prefixes and Artists, Genres, MusicGenres, Persons, Studios, Years entities. Removed SkiaSharp dependency. Compatible with KefinTweaks, Home Screen Sections, Media Bar Enhanced.

Fix: middleware no longer serves index.html from cache, allowing File Transformation plugins (Custom Tabs, JellyTweaks, Jellyfin Enhanced) to inject their HTML. Disable File Transformation integration by default to prevent conflicts.
Fix plugin version display (was always 0.0.0.0), fix config page save (PascalCase keys), fix IStartupFilter middleware injection, move e.preventDefault() before async code.

Fix middleware injection — replace IStartupFilter with custom IApplicationBuilderFactory that reliably injects middleware into the HTTP pipeline. Add diagnostic logging for middleware lifecycle. Config page now appears directly in the dashboard sidebar menu.
Fix config page: checkboxes and input fields now show correct default values on first load. Fix config save/load using camelCase keys for Jellyfin 10.11 System.Text.Json API.

AVIF image encoding support (auto-detected via SkiaSharp at runtime), format negotiation now prefers AVIF > WebP > JPEG in auto mode, default format changed to auto, fixed memory leak in image encoder, fixed Content-Type mismatch on runtimes without AVIF support.

Initial release: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native ImageSharp image optimization with 13 per-type settings, smart cache headers, HTML optimization, Link preload headers, CORS/CORP, optional security headers, plugin asset support, File Transformation bridge.
